ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Miscellaneous functions for classification and visualization, e.g. regularized discriminant analysis, sknn() kernel-density naive Bayes,  an interface to 'svmlight' and stepclass() wrapper variable selection  for supervised classification, partimat() visualization of classification rules  and shardsplot() of cluster results as well as kmodes() clustering for categorical data,  corclust() variable clustering, variable extraction from different variable clustering models  and weight of evidence preprocessing.

Miscellaneous functions for classification and visualization, e.g. regularized discriminant analysis, sknn() kernel-density naive Bayes,  an interface to 'svmlight' and stepclass() wrapper variable selection  for supervised classification, partimat() visualization of classification rules  and shardsplot() of cluster results as well as kmodes() clustering for categorical data,  corclust() variable clustering, variable extraction from different variable clustering models  and weight of evidence preprocessing.

name: r-klar
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.7-4" %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-klar
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/klaR_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/klaR/klaR_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 3488b3118960234bb17dbd8936be0599f769cb86dc3c324786fd397880307f0e

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-mass
    - r-combinat
    - r-questionr
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-mass
    - r-combinat
    - r-questionr

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('klaR')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('klaR')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: http://www.statistik.tu-dortmund.de
  license: GPL-2.0-or-later
  summary: Miscellaneous functions for classification and visualization, e.g. regularized discriminant analysis, sknn() kernel-density naive Bayes,  an interface to 'svmlight' and stepclass() wrapper variable selection  for supervised classification, partimat() visualization of classification rules  and shardsplot() of
    cluster results as well as kmodes() clustering for categorical data,  corclust() variable clustering, variable extraction from different variable clustering models  and weight of evidence preprocessing.
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - {{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
